title: Google Cloud Data Fusion Instance
description: Represents a Data Fusion instance, which is a managed environment for building and running data integration pipelines.

name.description: Output only. The name of this instance in the format projects/{project}/locations/{location}/instances/{instance}.

type.description: The type of the Data Fusion instance.

privateInstance.description: Specifies whether the Data Fusion instance should be private.

networkConfig.description: Network configuration options for a private instance.

network.description: Name of the network in the customer project.

ipAllocation.description: The IP range in CIDR notation to use for the managed Data Fusion instance nodes.

labels.description: The resource labels for instance to use to annotate any related underlying resources.

options.description: Map of additional options used to configure the behavior of Data Fusion instance.

createTime.description: Output only. The time the instance was created.

updateTime.description: Output only. The time the instance was last updated.

state.description: Output only. The current state of this Data Fusion instance.

serviceEndpoint.description: Output only. Endpoint on which the Data Fusion UI is accessible.

zone.description: Name of the zone in which the Data Fusion instance will be created.

apiEndpoint.description: Output only. Endpoint on which the REST APIs is accessible.
